title: Kanye West is Coming Back to a Music Festival in London
summary: Kanye West, a famous rapper from the US, will be the main performer at the Wireless Festival in London this year. He will play songs from his albums over three nights in July. This is his first big show in the UK since 2015. Kanye has said sorry for making hurtful comments about Jewish people in the past. The festival organizers are excited for his return. He recently released a new album called Bully. No other performers for the festival have been announced yet.

background_read: Kanye West is a popular musician known for his rap music and fashion. He has made many albums and performed at big events. Sometimes, he has said things that upset people, but he has tried to say sorry. Festivals like Wireless bring together artists to play music for fans.
Article_Structure: WHO: Kanye West, a US rapper
WHAT: He will headline the Wireless Festival in London
WHERE: At Finsbury Park in London
WHY: To perform his music and make a comeback after apologising for past comments

perspectives.description: Fans are happy to see Kanye West perform his songs again at a festival.
Some people worry because Kanye West has made hurtful comments before, even though he apologised.
